title: 🔥资金极度抱团，市场结构失衡
body: 市场处于资金极度抱团的失衡期。BTC.D升至58.5%，7日增长0.4%，资金在$68,143价位持续回流比特币。高 dominance 意味着场内流动性正在从山寨币抽离，市场呈现明显的吸血效应，缺乏普涨基础。结论：偏空。流动性何时才会外溢？
body_en: We're seeing a phase of extreme structural imbalance driven by aggressive capital consolidation. BTC.D is up 0.4% over the last 7 days to hit 58.5%, with capital relentlessly rotating back into Bitcoin at the $68,143 level. This high dominance signals a liquidity drain from alts—a classic "vampire effect" that kills any hope for a broad-based rally. Verdict: Bearish. When does the liquidity spill-over finally begin?
